script: (function(){ var result = {}; result.scrollY = window.scrollY; result.innerHeight = window.innerHeight; var allLarge = []; var allEls = document.querySelectorAll('div, section'); for (var i = 0; i < allEls.length; i++) { var e = allEls[i]; var r = e.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width > 200 && r.height > 100 && r.y > -200 && r.y < 1500) { var txt = (e.innerText||'').substring(0,100).replace(/\n/g,' '); allLarge.push({ tag: e.tagName, className: (e.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height), text: txt }); } } result.largeElements = allLarge; var noteItems = document.querySelectorAll('section.note-item'); result.firstNoteY = noteItems.length > 0 ? Math.round(noteItems[0].getBoundingClientRect().y) : null; result.noteCount = noteItems.length; var aiChat = document.querySelector('.xhs-ai-chat, [class*="ai-chat"], [class*="AiChat"], [class*="ai-answer"], [class*="search-ai"]'); if (aiChat) { var ar = aiChat.getBoundingClientRect(); result.aiChatArea = { tag: aiChat.tagName, className: (aiChat.className||'').toString().substring(0,100), visible: ar.width > 0 && ar.height > 0, x: Math.round(ar.x), y: Math.round(ar.y), w: Math.round(ar.width), h: Math.round(ar.height), text: (aiChat.innerText||'').substring(0,200).replace(/\n/g,' ') }; } else { result.aiChatArea = null; } return result; })()
